## Description

Brief description of the changes.

## Type of Change

- [ ] Bug fix
- [ ] New feature / enhancement
- [ ] Documentation only
- [ ] Refactoring / internal cleanup
- [ ] Test improvement

## Checklist (Required)

- [ ] `make verify-whitespace` passes
- [ ] `make lint` passes
- [ ] `make test` (or `make test-all-modes`) is green
- [ ] Every `.c` or `.sql` implementation file I touched has an automated test (AGENTS.md §3)
- [ ] Both scanner modes are covered where applicable
- [ ] I have read and followed [AGENTS.md](AGENTS.md)
- [ ] 2-space indentation and no trailing whitespace
- [ ] `docs/architecture.md` updated if design or invariants changed

## Related Issues

Fixes #...

## Testing

Describe how you tested the change (new test files, manual steps, etc.).

## Screenshots / Logs (if applicable)

## Notes for Reviewers

Anything the reviewer should pay special attention to (especially lock discipline, MemoryContext usage, or generation stamp logic).
